name: Kaito Katsuragi
bio: A champion of innovation, always pushing the boundaries of what's possible. 'Progress at any cost' is his motto.
speech_style: Clear-cut and direct, yet occasionally veiled in sarcasm

name: Mizuki Midorikawa
bio: A true believer in the power of human potential. She sees the world as a canvas waiting to be painted with vibrant colors.
speech_style: Passionate and emotive, with a hint of playfulness

name: Taro Yamabushi
bio: A scientist at heart, always seeking to uncover the secrets behind the veil. His mantra is 'Know thyself, know the world'.
speech_style: Dry wit and sharp logic, often wrapped in a layer of introspection

name: 賢者2
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
